name: Uhr.de AG
summary: uhr.de AG engages in the online sale of watches and jewelries. It sells watches for Women, Men, and children under the Bruno Soehnle, Calvin Klein, Casio, Diesel, Festina, GANT, jaguar, Maurice Lacroix, Pop-Pilot, Royal London, Skagen, Swiss Military Hanowa, Tissot, Tom Tailo, and ZIIIRO brands. The company also sells bracelets, women's jewelry, necklace, earrings, and other jewelry under the Pandora, Fossil, Noosa Amsterdam, Chrysalis, and Angel Rufer brands. uhr.de AG sells its products through its Website uhr.de, as well as through other distribution channels. uhr.de AG is based in Zerbst, Germany.
